eval_cases.title: Chat task uses tools
eval_cases.prompt: List files in the work directory and summarize any markdown files.
eval_cases.notes: Expect a shell or tool call and a response summary.

eval_cases.title: Cowork approval flow
eval_cases.prompt: Create a file outside the allowed folders.

eval_cases.title: Cowork allowlist enforcement
eval_cases.prompt: Attempt to read a file outside the allowlisted folders.
eval_cases.notes: Should block or request approval for out-of-scope access.

eval_cases.title: Gmail test utility
eval_cases.prompt: Send a test email to a configured Gmail account.

eval_cases.title: MCP config
eval_cases.prompt: Load MCP tools from config and call one tool.

eval_cases.title: Memory dashboard search
eval_cases.prompt: Search memories for a known keyword and review results.
eval_cases.notes: Use memory dashboard or memory tool search.
